title: Build Provenance
description: Per-image immutable provenance record. Emitted by .github/workflows/docker-build.yml. Verifies that an image digest corresponds to a specific commit and workflow run.

commit.description: Full Git commit SHA the image was built from.

image_digest_dashboard.description: Digest of the dashboard image, if pushed in the same run.

version.description: Contents of the VERSION file at build time.

actor.description: GitHub actor that triggered the build.

actions_pinned.description: Whether all third-party Actions in the workflow were pinned by 40-char commit SHA at the time of build.
